title: smilax muricata
intro: Smilax muricata, also known as the thorny or climbing smilax, is a type of flowering plant species belonging to the Smilacaceae family, characterized by its thorny stems and edible fruits. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Smilax muricata include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to topical creams and ointments.
